basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Forest Guard Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) has published the Vanpal (Forest Guard) Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 406/202526. The recruitment drive aims to fill 15 Vanpal (Forest Guard) positions. Candidates aged between 18 and 35 years and holding a Graduate degree are eligible to apply online. The application process is active and will remain open until 18 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are provided below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: General Category Physically Handicapped Male: 10 years General Category Physically Handicapped Female: 15 years (Max 45 years) Reserved Category Physically Handicapped Male: 15 years (Max 45 years) Reserved Category Physically Handicapped Female: 20 years (Max 45 years)

qualification.details: Graduate degree from a recognized university. Basic computer knowledge as per Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967. Knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.

salary_details.details: Initial fixed pay of Rs. 26,000/- per month for the first five years. After five years, eligible for regular appointment in the pay scale of Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/- (Level-4) as per the 7th Pay Commission.

selection_process: Written Test (MCQ) Physical Efficiency Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GSSSB Vanpal (Forest Guard) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB Vanpal recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the GSSSB Vanpal (Forest Guard) recruitment is 18th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum educational qualification required for the Vanpal post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is a Graduate degree from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Vanpal post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Vanpal post is between 18 to 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Vanpal position?
faq.answer: The initial fixed pay is Rs. 26,000/- per month for the first five years, followed by a regular pay scale of Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/- (Level-4).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Vanpal post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies for the Vanpal (Forest Guard) post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 400/-.

faq.question: Q7. What are the required computer knowledge skills?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have basic computer knowledge as per Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Vanpal recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test (MCQ), Physical Efficiency Test, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is strictly online through the official GSSSB website.

faq.question: Q10. Does GSSSB offer any age relaxation?
faq.answer: Yes, GSSSB offers age relaxation for physically handicapped candidates belonging to General and Reserved categories, with specific relaxations for males and females.
